# Local State: C08 Access Policy And Secrets

Credential fixtures:

- `Bearer token_s003_agent` -> `sub_agent_s003`, scopes `agent`.
- `Bearer token_s003_gateway` -> `sub_gateway_s003`, scopes `component`.
- `Bearer token_s003_runner` -> `sub_runner_s003`, scopes `worker`.

Policy fixtures are listed in `contract-excerpts.md`.
